meaning: n.分摊财政负担,估定的款项,税赋,苏格兰人 Scot 苏格兰人,苏格兰方言
examples: His accent proclaimed him to be a Scot.
The illusionist has come to the remote town, at the invitation of an enthusiastic admirer who was a Scot with a flirtatious kilt.
His accent proclaimed him a Scot.
And with the Scot frustrated and struggling physically, Wawrinka prevailed 6-7 (3-7) 7-6 (7-4) 6-3 6-3.
"She had more firepower and really started firing, especially in the second set, " said the Scot.
